summary: Completed verification testing of Lades-Pro-MD WhatsApp bot dashboard and ownership configuration. All critical APIs functioning correctly, bot is connected and operational, dashboard interface working properly.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Returns 404 - endpoint not implemented in proxy
Returns 404 - endpoint not implemented in proxy

design_issues.issue: Dashboard shows different interface than expected React frontend - appears to be Node.js dashboard directly
design_issues.note: Interface is functional and shows correct information, just different styling

passed_tests: ✅ Dashboard /api/commands endpoint returns command list (227 commands)
✅ config.env file has OWNER_NUMBER=905396978235 set correctly
✅ handler.js uses participantPn for LID resolution
✅ Dashboard frontend loads and shows 'Sistem Aktif' (System Active)
✅ Navigation menu fully functional (Panel, Bağlantı, İstatistikler, Eklentiler, Komutlar, Duyuru, Canlı Terminal, Ayarlar)
✅ Dashboard metrics display working (TOPLAM MESAJ, ÇALIŞAN KOMUT, AKTİF KULLANICI, YÖNETİLEN GRUP)
✅ Bot uptime and memory usage displayed correctly
✅ Bot is actively connected with phone number displayed
